author: SantiMod
content:
COMMUNITY ALERT @here   

  Star Atlas Community! Help us improve Star Atlas and its products by participating in a short one-on-one User Experience (UX) research call with our product design team.

  We're here to listen and talk about all feedback and experiences, good or bad, and we'd love to hear from you.    

Schedule a 30-minute casual chat now! (spots are limited)     https://bit.ly/3DrYQVr
